lighting.shadow_character: 부드럽고 옅은 그림자, 하이키(High-key) 스타일에 가까움

color.grading_style: 모던 클린 스타일 with 필름룩 (lifted blacks)

composition.focus_point: 커피잔을 잡고 있는 손과 잔의 경계

texture.detail_rendering: 리넨, 무광 세라믹, 과일 단면 등 다양한 질감의 대비를 통해 시각적 풍부함을 더함

improvement_notes: 더 강한 드라마를 위해 경광(Hard light)을 사용한 로우키(Low-key) 연출, 톤온톤(Tone-on-Tone) 컬러 매칭으로 미니멀한 무드 연출, 혹은 탑뷰(Top-view) 앵글로 기하학적 구도 강조 가능.
nano_banana_prompt: A vibrant and cheerful lifestyle food photography, a breakfast scene on a white linen tablecloth. The main subject is [Your Food/Drink Here]. The scene is styled with minimalist pastel ceramic tableware, fresh flowers in a small vase, and sliced fruits. The background is a mustard yellow tiled wall with a soft blue curtain on the side. The lighting is bright, airy, and diffused studio light, creating soft and gentle shadows, high-key aesthetic. The color palette is dominated by mustard yellow, pastel pink, mint green, and dusty blue. Shot with an 85mm lens at a 45-degree angle, shallow depth of field. The overall mood is modern, clean, and joyful. Photorealistic, high detail, Kodak Portra 400 film look.
